summary.shape_sentence: Early RTH flush and reclaim, long midday balance, then a 14:00 upside expansion that closed near the high.

goat.note: Post-14:00 breakout from the midday base launched the decisive afternoon trend leg.

red_circles.behavior: Mostly marked failed pops and local exhaustion during the morning and lunch rotation; their influence weakened in the afternoon uptrend.

green_circles.behavior: Clustered at the 10:20 washout low, at lunch higher lows, and on the 14:00 launch, showing improving buyer control.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply sat around 25090-25120 through midday and 25190-25235 late; the lower zone broke cleanly and the upper zone was largely absorbed by the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 24935-24980 and later 25000-25040 was defended multiple times and formed the base for the afternoon breakout.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening strength was failing; this marker led into the sharp morning selloff toward the session low.
time_markers.12pm_red: Market was in balanced midday chop around 25010 with no sustained directional control.
time_markers.2pm_green: Key upside inflection; demand held and the afternoon breakout leg began.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Session ended near the highs with late gains intact.

takeaway: Bullish recovery-to-trend day with an early washout, defended demand, and a post-14:00 upside expansion into a near-HOD close.
